case_title: WALKER, TROY ALLAN VS DAVIS, KEVIN ELWOOD

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WALKER, TROY ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KEVIN ELWOOD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KEVIN ELWOOD
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY DEFENDANT. SENT TO COURT FOR COMMISSIONER'S APPROVAL ($10 FEE PAID BY CASH).
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,559.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KEVIN ELWOOD
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, KEVIN ELWOOD
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-21-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-20-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 PERVIOUSLY SCHEDULED DEPOSTION IN BOSTON, MA.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, TROY ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, KEVIN ELWOOD $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,522.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
